title: Gold Farm (Nether Portal)
description: A large Nether-side gold farm that exploits piglin and zombified piglin spawning near nether portals. Build a 22x22 platform at Y=128 in the Nether to concentrate spawns. Mobs walk off the edge and fall into a killing chamber at the bottom (23.5 block fall for near-lethal damage). Hoppers collect gold nuggets and swords. Uses ~32 nether portals in a ring to maximize spawns. Afk platform for the player must be at the collection point, at least 24 blocks from the farm floor. Produces thousands of gold ingots per hour.
